title: Out Of Office Automation/Profile working status update
excerpt: It would be nice to have the ability to be able to set an Out of office automatic reply to any item/task you are assigned to or @mentioned on. If would be nice to have it either an as automation you have to set up or if …

posts.author: Amanda44 (Amanda Puckett)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be nice to have the ability to be able to set an Out of office automatic reply to any item/task you are assigned to or @mentioned on. If would be nice to have it either an as automation you have to set up or if you change your working status under your profile to out of office you can have a little note attached to it. It would be similar to setting an out of office notification to your email when you are on vacation or working but away from your desk. This feature would allow users to know if you need immediate response to contact X person because the main contact isn’t available.

posts.author: byteboutiquein (Raj)
posts.cookedHtml:
We built an Out of Office Assistant for monday that handles OOO coverage automatically.

What it does

  • Each user sets their OOO dates + backup once (Global setting)

  • On boards you choose: when the owner is OOO, the app posts a clear update

  • Optional auto-reassign to the backup (Hard mode)

  • If the backup isn’t a board subscriber (private board), it won’t reassign—it will only notify in updates

  • Optional @mention auto-reply with rate-limiting

Marketplace link: Out Of Office Assistant - monday.com Marketplace

posts.author: byteboutiquein (Raj)
posts.cookedHtml:
We built Out of Office Assistant to solve it inside boards:
• Users set OOO dates + choose a backup (global)
• Admin picks board behavior: Warn or Auto-reassign to backup
• @mention auto-reply with rate limits to avoid spam
